nodes.name: Main Fractionator Column
nodes.description: CDU overall balance node. Crude feed is separated by selected crude assay yields into final CDU product streams.
functions: Runs split-based CDU mass balance.
Compares unit feed against final hydrocarbon products.
Routes residue to HVU II and HVU III.
operation: PFD simplified block node; detail operasi dapat ditambahkan dari admin editor.
